title: Most Wonderful Carrot Cake
excerpt: Carrot cake has never been so easy. It may sound like a lot of ingredients, but it's really just tossing them together. I mixed everything by hand so as not to overwork it. It was just me and the wooden spoon.

seo.title: Most Wonderful Carrot Cake - Marinda Kook

html: Carrot cake has never been so easy.  It may sound like a lot of ingredients, but it's really just tossing them together.  I mixed everything by hand so as not to overwork it.  It was just me and the wooden spoon.

ingredientGroups.title: Dry ingredients
items: 250 ml chopped pecan nuts, plus a little extra for sprinkling on top

steps: Preheat your oven to 180C and grease two cake tins. I lined the bottom of my cake tins with baking paper.
In a bowl, mix all your dry ingredients.
In another bowl, mix all your wet ingredients.
Now stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients. Don't overwork it. A wooden spoon is good enough.
Divide the batter between your 2 cake tins. Tap them lightly on your kitchen counter to get all the air bubbles out. Bake for 45 minutes and test with a skewer to see if it's done.
Let it rest in the tins for 10 minutes. Turn it out onto a wire rack and let it cool before you decorate it.

directionGroups.title: For the icing
steps: Beat the butter and cream cheese until creamy and well combined.
Beat in the lemon zest if you prefer
Spread the icing between the two layers and on top of the cake. Sprinkle pecan nuts and finely grated lemon zest over.
